title: Cuemath Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cuemath Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Cuemath Advisory Limited in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath Advisory Limited:
Cuemath Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath Advisory Limited!
